error.signature: Cloudflare rules fire in wrong order — free plan has no rule ordering control

verdict.summary: Cloudflare free plan limits Page Rules to 3 with no execution order control.

dead_ends.action: Add more Page Rules to handle all edge cases
dead_ends.why_fails: Free plan is limited to 3 Page Rules

dead_ends.action: Use Workers to supplement Page Rules on free plan
dead_ends.why_fails: Free Workers plan has 100K requests/day limit

workarounds.action: Upgrade to Pro plan for 20 Page Rules and rule ordering
workarounds.how: $20/month Pro plan includes 20 Page Rules with explicit priority

workarounds.action: Consolidate rules using a single Worker with explicit routing logic
workarounds.how: Single Worker with if/else routing handles all rule logic deterministically
